creator: gslin@gslin.org
text:
Thanks all,

However I cannot get db-4.6.28.tar.gz right now. I'll try later and
double check this patch.

PS: I find similar issue from the following URL, maybe it's DNS problem:
http://forums.oracle.com/forums/thread.jspa?messageID=4029318&tstart=0

On Fri, Jan 15, 2010 at 01:30:11PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of databases/db48,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/142859 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/142859
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
